name: Business Wire Press Release Distribution API
what_it_does: Business Wire press release and regulatory news distribution REST API for corporate communications, investor relations, and public affairs teams to distribute news releases simultaneously to media, financial markets, regulatory bodies, and online destinations. Enables AI agents to manage regulatory news submission (SEC, EDGAR, NI-43-101) for investor relations compliance automation, handle simultaneous global news distribution for investor relations and corporate communications automation, access targeted media distribution by industry, geography, and subject code for PR outreach automation, retrieve financial terminal distribution (Bloomberg, Reuters, FactSet, S&P Capital IQ) for capital markets communication automation, manage multimedia content attachment for rich news release automation, handle news release analytics and media pickup for PR measurement automation, access AMP (Accelerated Mobile Pages) release format for mobile news consumption automation, retrieve SEO distribution for search engine visibility automation, manage newswire circuit selection (national, regional, international) for distribution optimization automation, and integrate Business Wire with investor relations platforms, PR software, and regulatory filing systems for end-to-end disclosure and communications automation.
use_cases: Filing regulatory disclosures from investor relations agents
Distributing earnings releases from corporate communications agents
Submitting SEC filings from regulatory compliance agents
Tracking media pickup from PR measurement agents
not_for: Social media content distribution (use social media management tools)
Internal employee communications (use Workvivo or Staffbase)
Blog and content marketing distribution (use content platforms)
best_when: A publicly traded company, investor relations team, or PR agency wanting AI agents to automate regulatory news disclosure, simultaneous earnings release distribution, financial terminal delivery, and media pickup tracking through Business Wire's regulated news distribution platform.
avoid_when: SEC FILING SIMULTANEOUS DISCLOSURE TIMING PRECISION: Business Wire SEC filing and Reg FD compliance requires precise timing for simultaneous public disclosure; automated financial disclosure must execute distribution at exactly specified embargo time; automated timing error (even minutes) for material information release creates Reg FD violation or market manipulation concern. MATERIAL NEWS CONTENT LEGAL REVIEW REQUIREMENT: Financial press releases typically require legal, IR, and executive review before distribution; automated press release distribution without proper review chain creates legal and regulatory risk; design automated workflows with mandatory review gate for material information releases. INTERNATIONAL DISTRIBUTION REGULATORY JURISDICTION VARIANCE: Business Wire international distribution is subject to each country's press release and securities disclosure regulations; automated international disclosure must comply with each jurisdiction's material information disclosure requirements; automated global simultaneous distribution without jurisdiction-specific legal review creates multi-country regulatory compliance risk.

auth.notes: Business Wire uses API key for integrations. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 1961 by Lorry Lokey. Acquired by Warren Buffett/Berkshire Hathaway in 2006. Parent: Berkshire Hathaway. Products: News distribution, regulatory disclosure, investor relations, media monitoring. Regulatory: SEC EDGAR, SEDAR, NI-43-101, FCA. Financial terminals: Bloomberg, Reuters, FactSet, S&P, Morningstar. Network: 89,000+ media outlets, 100,000+ journalists. Competes with PR Newswire (Cision) and Globe Newswire (Notified) for newswire distribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-release distribution fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-release fee based on word count, circuit (national/international), and distribution options; national US release $400-$900+; international add-on pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Berkshire Hathaway subsidiary. Per-release pricing. Regulatory disclosure capability. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; release submission throttled; webhooks for distribution and regulatory filing confirmation

known_agent_gotchas: EDGAR FILING CONFIRMATION REQUIRED FOR COMPLIANCE RECORD: Business Wire SEC filing confirmation includes EDGAR accession number; automated IR workflow must capture and store EDGAR accession number as compliance record; automated filing without accession number retention creates incomplete regulatory filing audit trail

EMBARGO SYSTEM RELIABILITY FOR MARKET SENSITIVITY: Business Wire embargo systems are highly reliable but network or system issues during embargo release can cause timing variance; automated earnings release embargo management must have backup distribution mechanism for system failure scenarios; single-point automated embargo release for market-sensitive information creates risk without backup

PRESS RELEASE WORD COUNT FEE CALCULATION: Business Wire pricing is based on word count with defined thresholds; automated press release generation must monitor word count to manage distribution costs; automated boilerplate and exhibit inclusion without word count tracking creates unexpected per-word fee overage

MULTIMEDIA RICH MEDIA FORMAT SPECIFICATIONS: Business Wire multimedia attachments require specific format and resolution specifications for terminal and media distribution; automated multimedia attachment must comply with Business Wire specifications; non-compliant images may not appear in terminal distribution reducing investor relations reach

NEWSWIRE CIRCUIT SELECTION FOR TARGETED DISTRIBUTION: Business Wire circuit selection (US National, US Regional, Industry, International) affects distribution cost and reach; automated circuit selection must match communication objective; automated national circuit selection for regional announcements creates cost overrun; automated regional selection for national news creates coverage gap
agent_readiness.security_notes: News distribution and regulatory filing. SOC2, SEC Reg FD, SEDAR, FCA. API key. US/EU. Press release and financial disclosure data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Regulatory news distribution. SOC2, SEC, SEDAR, FCA. API key. US/EU. Press release and regulatory filing data.
